Buy Tickets

Haunted ATX Ghost Tours

Paranormal Investigation Experience

Get hands-on with the spirits haunting The Clay Pit at The Bertram Building — one of Austin's most historically active paranormal locations.

Price
$59 / person
Duration
~2 hours
Schedule
Saturdays, 10:30 PM
Capacity
Up to 10 guests

About This Experience

Ready to get hands-on with the spirits? Haunted ATX offers an intimate deep dive into the paranormal at The Clay Pit inside The Bertram Building — every Saturday night. This is your chance to explore and communicate with the entities that have called this place home for over a century.

The Bertram Building was a general store opened in the 1850s by the Bertram family. Among the spirits believed to inhabit the building is one of the youngest — a child of the original Bertram family. Your guide will walk you through the building's fascinating history before introducing you to the investigative equipment. Then it's your turn to try communicating with the paranormal yourself. Guests are welcome to bring their own equipment for the investigation as well.

Please note there will be light walking and stairs — dress comfortably and come ready to listen.

Equipment Used

Professional paranormal investigation tools are provided — you'll learn how to use each one. Guests are welcome to bring their own equipment as well.

Spirit Box (P-SB7)

Scans the FM and AM bands along with high-frequency white noise, where spirit voices can seemingly form words.

EMF Detector

Entities are said to emit electromagnetic energy — this device detects unexplained fluctuations in electromagnetic fields.

REM Pod

Emits its own electromagnetic field and signals any disruptions that enter that field.

Thermal Camera

Measures the temperature of objects and entities in the room — including the ones you cannot see.

Digital Voice Recorder

Used to capture voices or sounds that may not be audible in the moment — reviewed after the session.

Cat Balls

Yes, cat balls. These motion-activated cat toys light up when touched — by someone, or something. A paranormal investigation staple.

Private Option Available

Private Paranormal Investigation

Want to investigate with just your group? Private paranormal investigations are typically held on Friday nights at 10:30 PM at The Bertram Building. The experience can be customized to accommodate your party size — minimum 2 guests, no fixed maximum.

Looking for a private investigation on a different night? Contact us and we'll do our best to make it happen.

Private Pricing:
  • First 2 tickets: $125 per person
  • Each additional ticket: $79 per person
Book a Private Investigation

Investigation Details

Price
Public: $59 per person, not including tax or gratuity.
Private: $125 per person for the first two tickets, $79 per person for each additional ticket.
When & Where
Public investigations run every Saturday at 10:30 PM at The Clay Pit, 1601 Guadalupe St, Austin, TX 78701. Please do not be late!
Minimum Party Size
We require at least 2 guests to run the experience. You may book individually and join other groups.
Maximum Party Size
The maximum party size is 10. Contact us for groups larger than 10.
Age
Due to tour content, we recommend guests be 13 and up. Content can be tailored for younger guests upon request.
Investigation Length
The experience lasts approximately 2 hours.
Food & Drinks
The Clay Pit kitchen and bar close at 10:00 PM. Guests are welcome to arrive early for a full sit-down meal, or order food and drinks to go during the investigation. No outside food or drink is permitted.
Gratuity
Your spiritual guide works hard to provide a safe and unique experience. Tipping is appreciated — here are some guidelines:
  • 18% — Good
  • 20% — Great
  • 25% — Amazing!
Cash, Venmo, Cash App, and other digital payments accepted.
Cancellation Policy
Space is very limited and spots cannot be re-sold once reserved.
  • No-shows, same-day cancellations, and cancellations with less than 48 hours notice: no refund
  • Canceled 2–7 days before your investigation: 50% refund
  • Canceled 7 or more days before your investigation: full refund
Disclaimer
Although we use professional equipment and take this spiritual dive seriously, Haunted ATX cannot guarantee that guests will find paranormal evidence during every investigation.

The spirits are waiting.

Saturday nights at The Clay Pit — check availability and secure your spot in the investigation.

$59 / person

Public investigation · Tax & gratuity not included
